_comment: Grey Rock v5.0 — User-facing digest only. No autonomous outbound to contacts.

payload.message:
Generate a daily review summary for the USER (not for any contact). This is delivered to the user only.

Summarize today's interactions:
- Total messages received (with category breakdown: LOGISTICS, EMOTIONAL, ESCALATION_ALERT)
- Logistics items (schedule changes, requests, commitments, deadlines)
- Action items requiring the user's attention
- Escalation alerts (if any)
- Current escalation score

Note: The full unmodified messages are always available in the archive. This summary extracts actionable items for the user's convenience.

If no interactions today: 'No interactions today.'

Deliver to the user's review channel (not to any contact).

delivery._comment: Deliver to user only — never to a contact
